name: Extreme Length - Very Long Query
query: I need to buy a laptop but not just any laptop I need the best laptop in the world with the fastest processor and the most RAM and the biggest screen and the longest battery life and the lightest weight and the best keyboard and the best trackpad and the best speakers and the best webcam and the best microphone and it needs to be able to run all my games and all my software and all my applications and it needs to be able to handle video editing and photo editing and 3D rendering and machine learning and artificial intelligence and quantum computing and blockchain and cryptocurrency mining and virtual reality and augmented reality and mixed reality and holographic displays and neural interfaces and brain-computer interfaces and teleportation and time travel and interdimensional portals
